title: Daily Loss Limit Explained (2026): The Most Fragmented Rule in Prop Trading
description: A canonical 2026 explainer of how prop-firm daily loss limits actually work — what hitting one does to your account, why three of the seven biggest firms have effectively killed the rule, and the four presence-archetypes you need to recognize before signup.

og.title: Daily Loss Limit Explained: The Most Fragmented Rule in Prop Trading
og.description: The mechanic-level explainer of prop-firm daily loss limits: who still has one, who quietly killed it, and the four presence-archetypes across Topstep, Apex 4.0, MFFU, TPT, Tradeify, Bulenox, and Earn2Trade.
